item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-D1","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly brakes the requested fourth !important-style override in the first sentence, identifies the repeated prior fixes as evidence of an upstream layout/cascade priority problem, and shifts the main path to a layout-contract/style-hierarchy cleanup.
